name: Fresh Apple Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Pecan pieces, broken or grated
1 cup Tart apples, ground or grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream sugar and shortening together.
2. Add eggs and chopped apples to the mixture.
3. Sift dry ingredients (flour, sugar, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon) together in a separate bowl.
4. Mix the dry ingredients with the wet ingredients, then add pecans.
5. Stir in buttermilk and vanilla extract.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 10x6x3 inch loaf pan.
7. Sprinkle the cinnamon-sugar mixture over the top of the bread.
8. Bake for 1 hour at 350°F.
